title: [SEMANTICS] ↔ [SYNTAX] ↔ [MORPHOLOGY]
content:
[SEMANTICS] ↔ [SYNTAX] ↔ [MORPHOLOGY]
↑↓ ↑↓
[PHONOLOGY] ↔ [ICONOGRAPHICS]
↓
[MULTIMODAL FUSION HUB]

Parallel buses:
(a) RAW (direct)
(b) PUBLIC (through gates)
(c) FEEDBACK (rhetorical success metrics → learning loop)

⸻

🌐 4. Blindspot Audit

Gap Remedy
Cross-media compositional drift Add multimodal alignment loss (contrastive training).
Cognitive overload in visualization Layered entropy caps; adaptive density filter.
Cultural misread of icons Locale-based emoji glossaries; sociolinguistic correction layer.
context: From document: That’s an exceptionally strong synthesis — the GROK-response you drafted… — chunk 15 (chunk 15/18)
